sections.paragraph:
Φῆστος, ου, ὁ (PLond III, 904, 33 p. 126 [104 a.d.]; Josephus index) Porcius Festus, successor to Felix (s. Φῆλιξ) as procurator of Palestine. Neither the beginning nor the end (at his death) of his term of office can be determined with full certainty, though it is gener. assumed that he died in the early 60s. During his rule and w. his consent Paul went to the imperial court at Rome. Ac 24:27; 25:1, 4, 9, 12–14, 22–24; 26:24f, 32.—Schürer I, 467f; Zahn, Einl. II3 647ff; ESchwartz, NGG 1907, 294ff; UHolzmeister, Der hl. Pls vor dem Richterstuhle des Festus: ZKT 36, 1912, 489–511; 742–82; ESpringer, D. Prozess des Ap. Pls: PJ 217, 1929, 182–96: Taubenschlag, OpMin II, 721–26 (pap); RJewett, A Chronology of Paul’s Life ’79; RCassidy, Society and Politics in the Acts of the Apostles ’87; Pauly-W. XXII, 200–227; BHHW I 479; Haenchen, index.—M-M.

PLond PLond = PLondon=Greek Papyri in the British Museum—List 4

gener. gener. = generally

Zahn Zahn = TZ., various works—List 6

NGG NGG = Nachrichten der Gesellschaft der Wissenschaften zu/in Göttingen, Philologisch-historische Klasse—List 6

ZKT ZKT = Zeitschrift für katholische Theologie—List 6

PJ

PJ = Preussische Jahrbücher—List 6

Pj = Palästinajahrbuch—List 6

Taubenschlag, OpMin Taubenschlag, OpMin = Opera Minora

pap pap = papyrus, -yri

Pauly-W Pauly-W = AP./GW., Real-Encyclopädie der klassischen Altertumswissenschaft—List 6

BHHW BHHW = Biblisch-historisches Handwörterbuch—List 6

Haenchen Haenchen = EH., Commentary on Acts—List 6

M-M M-M = JMoulton/GMilligan, Vocabulary of Greek Testament—Lists 4, 6

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 1053
